productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherite Orange Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 24 cmWidth: 28 cmDepth: 12 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper, a zippered separator and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials                                                Adjustable strap and a long removable cross metallic chain for carrying ease and styleZipper pocket at the back and sides for additional space                                    Decorative stones embellished in the front for style                                    Metallic embellishment with brand name on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
